option.option-text: Rear axle, crown wheel 485, hypoid, 13.0 t
Trail. axle 10 t, de-loadable, liftable,twin tyres
Electronic braking system with ABS and ASR
Electr. compressed air supply and control, centre
Disc brakes on front and rear axle
Step plate above frame, partial cover
Battery carrier, batteries side by side
Front mudguard, fender skirt, aerodynam. optimised
Armrests on both sides, co-driver's seat
Luxury bed, top, wide, with levelling control
Seat cover, Dinamica, black, driver`s seat
Seat cover, Dinamica, black, co-driver`s seat
Mattress topper for lower comfort bed
Sunblind, side, driver's and co-driver's side
LED ambient lighting, driving and living
Noise and heat insulation of cab
Stowage flaps, above windscreen, one lockable
Stowage compartment lid, driver and co-driver side
Flexible shelving sys.,f. stowage above windscreen
Additional socket, 12 V/15 A, co-driver footwell
No. 1 switch, for non-MB body electrics
No. 2 switch, for non-MB body electrics
Cable remote control for air suspension
USB-C con., in side wall stowage comp., left
USB-C con., in side wall stowage comp., right
Cab side deflectors, without air deflectors
Windscreen, tinted, with filter band, heated
MirrorCam bracket, chrome, lower cover, cab colour
Bumper centre section with towing eyes
Tyres, tubeless, size 315/70 R 22.5, rear axle
Wheel arrangement 6x2, trailing axle, twin tyres
Heavy-duty model series, new generation from 18 t
Belt warning w/ seat occup. detection, co-driver
Driving assistance map, South Korea region
Tank, 290 l, left, 650 x 700 x 750 mm, aluminium
Protective cap for AdBlue metering system
Initial filling, additional 30 litres of fuel
Exhaust system, outlet to left, under 30 degrees
Illumination regulation, in acc. with UN-R 48.06
LED turn signals in light signature
1 LED work light, cab rear wall, top
Bottom shell to prevent swirling-up of dust
Noise regulation acc. to UN-R 51.03, phase 2
Insect screen in front of cooling system
Coolant service interval, long for non-SWR
Control code for A dimension, rear axle 435 mm
Lowered frame, with residual bellow pressure ctrl.
